summary: Iteration 6 — v1.3.2 OTA frontend verification. Static / code review PASS on all five workstreams: dashboard '🔄 Refresh' button + 60 s STALE_THRESHOLD_MS + per-member freshness/refreshing testIDs, member-detail refresh chip + member-freshness/member-refreshing-banner testIDs, add-routine TimePicker12 with routine-time-picker testID (old 8-block 24-hour preset grid removed), fallDetector.ts four-phase state machine + fall-detection-test.tsx phase card + fall-test-simulate testID, and silent_v2 channel constant matches between frontend (src/push.ts:326) and backend (server.py:2577). E2E live verification PARTIAL — blocked by two issues: (1) CRITICAL Expo-web crash on /fall-detection-test ('this._nativeModule.addListener is not a function' at fall-detection-test.tsx:80:33) which prevents the phase card, Simulate button, and overlay from mounting on web preview, and (2) /pin-setup → /dashboard skip ('Not now', testID pin-setup-skip) is silently a no-op on web — multiple click strategies (Playwright .click, mouse coordinate click, locator click) all leave the user on /pin-setup, so dashboard / member-detail / SOS / add-routine UI could not be reached for live click-through validation. SOS modal, dashboard '🔄 Refresh' tap, member-detail refresh chip tap, routine-time-picker modal, and FallDetectionOverlay 30 s countdown were therefore not exercised end-to-end.

ui_bugs.issue: Page crashes with Expo-web red-screen 'this._nativeModule.addListener is not a function' at fall-detection-test.tsx:80:33 the instant the route mounts. Root cause: useFallDetector() calls isFallAvailable() → Accelerometer.isAvailableAsync(), and expo-sensors throws on web while instantiating its NativeEventEmitter. The downstream Platform.OS==='web' return-early in the addListener useEffect (fallDetector.ts:302) does NOT protect the initial Accelerometer.isAvailableAsync() probe (line 175).

Tapping 'Not now' (testID pin-setup-skip) on Expo web is a no-op — does not persist the deferred flag and does not navigate to /(tabs)/dashboard. Pre-existing or regression unknown, but it now blocks any RN-web UI walkthrough of the new v1.3.2 dashboard/member-detail/add-routine changes.

integration_issues.issue: Could not verify the Simulate → 30 s overlay modal end-to-end on web because the page crashes before mount. Native runtime (Platform.OS !== 'web') is unaffected by the inner addListener gate, but the Accelerometer.isAvailableAsync() probe should still be web-guarded so the test page renders for QA on web preview.

integration_issues.flow: Dashboard regression (login → dashboard → SOS / refresh-all-btn / member detail / add-routine)
integration_issues.issue: Blocked by pin-setup-skip no-op. All assertions had to fall back to static code review.

react_native_issues.issue: isFallAvailable() → Accelerometer.isAvailableAsync() is called unconditionally on mount and throws on Expo web (expo-sensors NativeEventEmitter). Wrap the call with `if (Platform.OS === 'web') return false;` before invoking Accelerometer.isAvailableAsync(). Reference: src/fallDetector.ts:173-179 and :289.

action_items: FIX: Guard isFallAvailable() with Platform.OS==='web' early-return so /fall-detection-test mounts cleanly on Expo web preview and QA can exercise the Simulate → FallDetectionOverlay flow (src/fallDetector.ts:173-179).

INVESTIGATE: /pin-setup 'Not now' (testID pin-setup-skip) click handler is silently failing on Expo web — neither the AsyncStorage write nor router.replace('/(tabs)/dashboard') executes. Verify the TouchableOpacity's onPress is wired and that the dismiss helper from src/pinSetupPrompt.ts persists for the current user id. Without this, no v1.3.2 UI flow can be E2E-tested on web.

ONCE THE TWO BLOCKERS ARE CLEARED: re-test (a) dashboard refresh-all-btn tap fires requestRefresh for every non-self member and the per-card freshness label flips to 'Refreshing location…' for ≥1 s, (b) member-detail refresh chip toggles between '🔄 Refresh' and '🔄 Refreshing…' with the testID member-refreshing-banner appearing, (c) add-routine routine-time-picker opens 12-hour modal, selecting 7:45 AM and tapping Done updates the field and POST /api/reminders succeeds, (d) FallDetectionOverlay 30-second countdown appears after fall-test-simulate tap.
critical_code_review_comments: src/locationRefreshState.ts: STALE_THRESHOLD_MS = 60_000 (was 2 min) ✓. HARD_TIMEOUT_MS = 15_000 ensures the per-member spinner can never get stuck. subscribeRefreshing / clearIfNewer / requestRefresh public API is clean and used consistently from dashboard.tsx and member/[id].tsx.

app/(tabs)/dashboard.tsx: refresh-all-btn (line 474) calls onRefresh() AND requests pull-on-stale for every non-self member regardless of freshness — correct manual-override semantics. MemberCard subscribes per-id via subscribeRefreshing and ticks 'X ago' label every 20 s. testIDs member-freshness-{id} and member-refreshing-{id} present.

app/member/[id].tsx: testID member-refresh-location on the Location-section chip ✓, member-freshness on the '🕒 Last updated X ago' Text ✓, member-refreshing-banner on the in-flight banner ✓. Pull-on-stale fired from load() with the same 60 s threshold.
app/add-routine/[memberId].tsx: 24-hour preset grid removed; replaced with a single TimePicker12 field (testID routine-time-picker, line 111). Confirms the old 8-block grid is gone.

src/fallDetector.ts: FallPhase = 'idle' | 'impact-detected' | 'orientation-confirmed' | 'stillness-watching' | 'cooldown' (line 145). PhaseDebug exposes magnitudeG / orientationDeltaDeg / stillnessFractionPct for the test UI. simulateFall() bypasses sensors and fires onFallDetected. Web is gated at line 302 for the listener, but the isAvailableAsync probe at line 175 is NOT gated — this is the crash source on /fall-detection-test web.

src/push.ts (line 326): Notifications.setNotificationChannelAsync('silent_v2', { importance: MIN, sound: null, enableVibrate: false, lockscreenVisibility: SECRET }). Legacy 'silent' channel deleted before re-creation.
backend/server.py (line 2577): request_location_refresh POSTs data-only push with `channelId: "silent_v2"` + `_contentAvailable: True` for iOS silent. Constant matches frontend exactly ✓.

success_rate.frontend: Static code review 100% PASS on all 5 workstreams; Live E2E ~0% — blocked by fall-detection-test crash + pin-setup-skip no-op.

seed_data_creation: None. Used pre-existing Alice JWT from /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two blockers must be cleared before live click-through verification: (1) wrap Accelerometer.isAvailableAsync() with Platform.OS==='web' early-return in src/fallDetector.ts so /fall-detection-test renders on web, and (2) repair the pin-setup-skip TouchableOpacity onPress so the user can leave /pin-setup on web. Pre-existing reports (iteration_5 and earlier) suggested clicking 'Not now' worked — this regression should be A/B'd against the last good build. Once cleared, the test plan above (action items #3) walks through every v1.3.2 UI surface. Static code already verified all testIDs and the silent_v2 constant match.
rca_of_issue: fall-detection-test crash: useFallDetector() (src/fallDetector.ts:287-293) eagerly probes Accelerometer.isAvailableAsync() on mount. expo-sensors on web instantiates a NativeEventEmitter whose underlying ._nativeModule has no addListener method, throwing the unhandled exception that Expo's RN-web error overlay then displays. Web gate already exists for the listener subscription effect (line 302) but is missing on the capability probe; the cure is a one-liner Platform.OS==='web' early-return inside isFallAvailable(). Reproduction: open http://localhost:3000/fall-detection-test in any browser with the v1.3.2 bundle — red-screen appears within 1 s.
